description.value: You unleash powerful telepathic feedback to assail the minds of your foes and render them unwell. Any number of enemy creatures you can sense within range of your limited telepathy take @Damage[14d6[mental]] damage with a @Check[will|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. You can choose for any of these creatures to take nonlethal instead of lethal damage from Telepathic Onslaught. On a failure, creatures are also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure).
